render.stdout:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: drone-swarm
---
apiVersion: v1
data:
  DRONE_BACKEND_DEMO_FLEET_SIZE: "0"
  DRONE_BACKEND_MODE: production
  DRONE_BACKEND_SIMULATION_ENABLED: "false"
  DRONE_BACKEND_STALE_SEC: "5"
  DRONE_DEVICE_REGISTRY_FILE: /app/config/device-registry.json
  DRONE_REQUIRE_SIGNED_COMMANDS: "true"
  DRONE_SECURITY_PROFILE: production
  DRONE_SWARM_ADDR: :8080
  DRONE_TLS_CA_FILE: /app/certs/ca.crt
  DRONE_TLS_CERT_FILE: /app/certs/server.crt
  DRONE_TLS_ENABLED: "true"
  DRONE_TLS_KEY_FILE: /app/certs/server.key
  DRONE_TLS_REQUIRE_CLIENT_CERT: "true"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: control-plane-config
  namespace: drone-swarm
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: control-plane-secrets
  namespace: drone-swarm
stringData:
  DRONE_OPERATOR_CREDENTIALS: operator-console-1:operator:replace-with-operator-secret;operator-console-2:commander:replace-with-second-secret
  DRONE_OPERATOR_ID: replace-with-operator-id
  DRONE_OPERATOR_ROLE: operator
  DRONE_OPERATOR_SECRET: replace-with-operator-secret
  DRONE_SWARM_SECRET: replace-with-strong-shared-secret
type: Opaque
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: control-plane
  namespace: drone-swarm
spec:
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: control-plane
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: control-plane
  namespace: drone-swarm
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: control-plane
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: control-plane
    spec:
      containers:
      - envFrom:
        - configMapRef:
            name: control-plane-config
        - secretRef:
            name: control-plane-secrets
        image: drone-swarm/control-plane:production
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /api/v1/health
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 15
          periodSeconds: 20
        name: control-plane
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /api/v1/ready
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 15
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 128Mi
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /app/certs
          name: certs
          readOnly: true
        - mountPath: /app/config
          name: config
          readOnly: true
      serviceAccountName: default
      volumes:
      - emptyDir: {}
        name: certs
      - emptyDir: {}
        name: config
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: control-plane
  namespace: drone-swarm
spec:
  maxReplicas: 5
  metrics:
  - resource:
      name: cpu
      target:
        averageUtilization: 70
        type: Utilization
    type: Resource
  minReplicas: 2
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: control-plane
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-redirect: "true"
  name: control-plane
  namespace: drone-swarm
spec:
  rules:
  - host: drone-swarm.example.internal
    http:
      paths:
      - backend:
          service:
            name: control-plane
            port:
              number: 80
        path: /
        pathType: Prefix
